name: lingua-typescript-example
description: Example demonstrating Lingua universal message format conversion

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const userAgent = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (process.env.INIT_CWD === process.cwd() && !userAgent.includes('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm in this repo.'); process.exit(1); }"
